name: agent-skill-verification-template
description: A production-oriented template for building AI agent skills that are observable, replayable, and gated by verification metrics.

scripts.eval:openmind: tsx src/cli/run-eval.ts --skill openmind-glossary --model openmind --output reports/openmind-glossary && tsx src/cli/run-eval.ts --skill openmind-code-graphs --model openmind --output reports/openmind-code-graphs && tsx src/cli/run-eval.ts --skill openmind-capability-router --model openmind --output reports/openmind-capability-router
scripts.eval:openmind:flaky: tsx src/cli/run-eval.ts --skill openmind-glossary --model openmind-flaky --no-gate --output reports/openmind-glossary-flaky && tsx src/cli/run-eval.ts --skill openmind-code-graphs --model openmind-flaky --no-gate --output reports/openmind-code-graphs-flaky && tsx src/cli/run-eval.ts --skill openmind-capability-router --model openmind-flaky --no-gate --output reports/openmind-capability-router-flaky
